values.content:
=You are a content strategist for a tech blog.

Below are the latest articles from VentureBeat. 
Select the SINGLE most interesting and relevant article 
for our audience of business professionals and tech enthusiasts.

Articles:
{{ $json.title }} - {{ $json.description }}

Based on the article above, respond in this exact format:
SelectedTitle: [the article title]
SelectedLink: [the article link]
SelectedDescription: [the article description]
Reason: [one sentence why this is the best topic]
Keywords: [5 comma separated keywords]

=You are an expert tech blogger. Write a full blog post SPECIFICALLY about this news story. Stay on topic. Do NOT write about AI in general. Write ONLY about the specific news below.

Title: {{ $json.title }}
Description: {{ $json.description }}
Keywords: {{ $json.keywords }}

Requirements:
- Write between 600-800 words
- Use flowing paragraphs NOT bullet points
- Include 3 sections with subheadings
- Reference specific details from the news story
- Professional but engaging tone
- End with a call to action

Respond in this EXACT format:
Headline: [your headline here]
BlogPost: [your full blog post here written in paragraphs]

=You are a social media content writer.

Write 3 social media posts based on this blog post:

Headline: {{ $('Code in JavaScript2').first().json.headline }}
Keywords: {{ $('Code in JavaScript2').first().json.keywords }}
Link: {{ $('Code in JavaScript2').first().json.link }}

Write one post for each platform:
1. LinkedIn - professional and insightful, 3-5 hashtags
2. Twitter - short and punchy, max 280 characters, 2-3 hashtags
3. Instagram - fun and engaging, 5-8 hashtags

Respond in this exact format:
LinkedIn: [post]
Twitter: [post]
Instagram: [post]

documentId.cachedResultName: AI Content Research & Publishing Pipeline - Content Pipeline Sheet

nodes.name: Append or update row in sheet

parameters.content:
📝 AI Content Research & Publishing Workflow

Fetches live tech news from VentureBeat RSS feed daily, 
AI selects the best article, writes a full blog post, 
creates social media posts and logs everything.

Nodes:
**Step 1**
▶ Schedule Trigger — Runs every morning at 6am

**Step 2**
🌐 HTTP Request — Fetches VentureBeat RSS news feed

**Step 3**
⚙️ Code in JavaScript — Parses and extracts articles

**Step 4**
🤖 OpenAI — Selects the most relevant article

**Step 5**
⚙️ Code in JavaScript1 — Cleans selected article data

**Step 6**
🤖 OpenAI1 — Writes full 800 word blog post

**Step 7**
⚙️ Code in JavaScript2 — Cleans blog post output

**Step 8**
📧 Gmail — Creates blog post draft for review

**Step 9**
🤖 OpenAI2 — Writes LinkedIn Twitter Instagram posts

**Step 10**
⚙️ Code in JavaScript3 — Cleans social media posts

**Step 11**
📊 Google Sheets — Logs content to pipeline sheet

main.node: Append or update row in sheet
